# Markdown Memory Compounding

The repo is the agent's long-term marketing brain.

## Memory categories

```text
memory/product_facts.md
memory/buyer_language.md
memory/buyer_objections.md
memory/channel_findings.md
memory/offer_findings.md
memory/proof_assets.md
memory/tactic_performance.md
memory/experiment_memory.md
memory/failed_hypotheses.md
memory/winning_patterns.md
memory/do_not_repeat.md
```

## Memory update format

```text
## YYYY-MM-DD - Finding title

Source campaign:
Evidence:
Confidence:
Implication:
Use in future:
Avoid in future:
```
